holdings.infoBox: EWX is an equity ETF with a total of 3426 individual holdings. The top holdings are Macronix International stock at 0.73%, WinWay Technology at 0.68%, SSI US GOV MONEY MARKET CLASS at 0.65%, Kinsus Interconnect Technology at 0.55%, and WIN Semiconductors at 0.50%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Emerging Markets Small Cap ETF (EWX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Emerging Markets <2B index, a market-cap-weighted index of emerging markets securities with small capitalization. EWX was launched on May 12, 2008 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: 10 Best Emerging Market ETFs for Global Growth
data.text: The global economy is expected to rebound sharply this year and next. These are the best emerging market ETFs to leverage this potential source of growth.

data.title: 10 Best Emerging Markets ETFs for a Global Rebound
data.text: Emerging markets ETFs can inject growth into your portfolio, as well as provide some much-needed diversification. Here are 10 top EM funds.
